chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-160 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 3946/16 2. For hearing of main case 25.02.2019 This petition was filed on 18.01.2016 and since then the petitioner has never taken any interest to get this matter posted in the Court for proceeding. Today, for the first time this matter has been fixed in the court when the petitioner and his counsel are called absent and no intimation is received. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
